meaning: n.急速拍打声,轻快脚步声,行话,(魔术师或小丑的)喋喋快语,饶舌vi.急速地说,滴答地响,发出急速轻拍声,念经,念顺口溜,祷告vt.使发嗒嗒声,喋喋不休地说
examples: Women found him charming. It must have been his patter because he's not good-looking.
We can't wait to hear the patter of tiny feet.
Bewitched by the patter of a perfume merchant, entranced by the pink and gold of these scented flasks.
As Painter interrupted the auction, his BlackBerry aloft, the auctioneer eyed him but never broke patter.
With his sales patter and his brief time as a policeman, McCormick was a convincing pitch man.
